description: Create an alphabetical index for the AirMax 5000 Service Manual located at /home/ga/Documents/hvac_service_manual.docx. Mark the following terms as index entries throughout the document: 'Compressor', 'Condenser coil', 'Evaporator coil', 'Refrigerant', 'Thermostat', 'Blower motor', 'Expansion valve', 'Economizer', 'Heat exchanger', and 'Capacitor'. The document must conclude with a new page featuring a 'Heading 1' titled 'Index' followed by the generated alphabetical index. Save the result to /home/ga/Documents/hvac_manual_indexed.docx.
